Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 3, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Gerald Ragan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Rhonda Fung.Douglas Alan Holloway, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Trinity Capital Corporation. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $31,981.65, Fees: $2,500.00, Interest: $1,089.46, Costs: $314.50 for a total judgment of $35,885.61. Judgment signed in open court.
